screen.enthusia_autoclicker.title: Enthusia AutoClicker Settings
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_enabled: Enables automated left-click input while the autoclicker is running.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_mode.to: Click presses attack at the selected interval. Hold keeps attack pressed.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.left_interva: Ticks between left clicks. The minimum is 20 ticks.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.food_enabled: Pauses left clicking when hungry, eats food from the offhand, then resumes.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.food_thresho: Starts eating when the food bar is at or below this value. Valid values are 1 through 19.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_enable: Enables automated right-click input while the autoclicker is running.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_mode.t: Click presses use at the selected interval. Hold keeps use pressed.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.right_interv: Ticks between right clicks. The minimum is 20 ticks.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.run_duration: Stops the autoclicker after this many ticks. Use 0 to run until the keybind stops it.
screen.enthusia_autoclicker.status_messa: Shows enabled, disabled, and timer-complete messages above the hotbar.
